description:
This quiz tests deep understanding of JavaScript closures, covering edge cases like stale closures and `this` binding. It starts at a moderate difficulty and escalates to advanced, with a direct, slightly humorous teaching tone that challenges developers to confront gaps in their knowledge.
Topics: closures, scope chain, stale closures, this binding, React hooks, module patterns, event handlers, factory functions
Audience: JavaScript developers who think they understand closures and want to test their knowledge on edge cases
